violations.text: The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Refrigerator #1 was in poor repair. At time of inspection, ambient was 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service prior to inspection, service ticket submitted. Refrigerator #2 was in poor repair. At time of inspection, ambient was 44 degrees Fahrenheit, no TCS foods in unit. Freezer was in poor repair. At time of inspection, ambient was 65 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service prior to inspection, service ticket submitted. Refrigerator #3 was in poor repair. At time of inspection, ambient was 65 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service prior to inspection, service ticket submitted. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail and refrigerator shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (juice, Lunchables) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

Several foods were observed held at 47-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

Refrigerator #1 was in poor repair. At time of inspection, ambient was 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service at time of inspection. See disposal. Refrigerator #2 was in poor repair. At time of inspection, ambient was 45 degrees Fahrenheit. At time of inspection, no TCS foods in unit. Freezer was in poor repair. At time of inspection, ambient was 29 degrees Fahrenheit. Service ticket was put in prior to inspection. Refrigerator #3 was in poor repair. At time of inspection, ambient was 65 degrees Fahrenheit. Service ticket was put in prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1. Refrigerator #1 shelving (white residue) 2. Refrigerator #3 shelving (black residue) 3. Retail shelving (black residue/other debris) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
